.canvas-card-menu.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.canvas-node-container .markdown-rendere.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.file-embed.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.workspace-leaf-content.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat fixed 50% 50% / cover padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat fixed 50% 50% / cover padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input.prompt-input[type=\"text\"].background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"text\"].background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(even).background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.016) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
